prompt: Compare Sender-Initiated (SI-LB) and Receiver-Initiated (RI-LB) Load Balancing algorithms. Which one maintains performance under heavy load?
reference_answer: SI-LB probes for underloaded nodes, while RI-LB probes for overloaded nodes. RI-LB maintains better performance under heavy load because busy nodes do not waste CPU cycles probing; only idle nodes actively seek work.
